svg.aria-label: Docker AI DockerDash code execution flaw, React Native Metro4Shell RCE CVE-2025-11953, AWS IAM Identity Center multi-region security AI agent 3Cs
svg.title: 2026-02-04: DockerDash Code Exec, Metro4Shell CVE-2025-11953, AWS IAM Multi-Region

g.text: Docker AI assistant DockerDash code execution vulnerability : AI-generated commands run without sandboxing : container escape risk in developer environments
Disable DockerDash in prod : enforce rootless Docker for dev environments
Disable DockerDash AI assistant until patch applied : enforce rootless Docker daemon : restrict container capabilities : audit Docker daemon socket exposure
React Native CLI Metro4Shell CVE-2025-11953 RCE : attacker-controlled Metro bundler config executes arbitrary code : SSDLC dependency chain risk for mobile dev
Update React Native CLI : pin Metro bundler to patched version
Upgrade React Native CLI and Metro bundler immediately : verify CVE-2025-11953 patch in changelog : review metro.config.js for untrusted input paths
AWS IAM Identity Center multi-region security analysis : permission set replication lag creates privilege escalation window : AI agent 3Cs security principles published
Audit IAM Identity Center replication : enforce SCPs to close privilege gap
Review IAM Identity Center permission sets across all regions : enforce Service Control Policies to limit effective permissions : monitor CloudTrail for cross-region IAM events
